top_signals.title: Japan’s Humble 10-Yen Coin Now Worth 10.4 Yen On AI Copper Rally
top_signals.summary: Japan’s 10-yen coin, predominantly composed of copper, is now worth more in metal than its face value as AI-fueled demand boosts prices for the highly conductive material.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Treasury yields inch higher as investors await Fed interest rates decision
top_signals.summary: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose over 1 basis point to 4.439%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan’s Gimber Sees Value in European Stocks After Oil Shock
top_signals.summary: European equities offer value opportunities following the recent decline in oil prices, particularly consumer-facing stocks and energy-sensitive cyclicals, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Hugh Gimber.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: BitGo courts crypto firms awaiting MiCA approval amid Binance licensing concerns
top_signals.summary: BitGo launches a MiCA-compliant crypto infrastructure platform in Europe as exchanges face pressure to meet July 1 licensing rules across the EU.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: New Wharton forecast puts Social Security trust fund depletion later than official projections
top_signals.summary: Social Security's retirement trust fund may dry up in February 2033, according to a new report from the Penn Wharton Budget Model shared exclusively with CNBC.

top_signals.title: Intel begins production of most-advanced chip, inching closer to possible Apple deal
top_signals.summary: Intel is entering production of 18A-P, its most-advanced chip node that could be the target of a coming deal with Apple
